final:
module RefModule(
		input clk, 
		input [31:0]  instr_i,
		input [31:0]  pc_i,
		output reg [31:0] pc_o,	
		output reg [31:0] instr_o
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		instr_o=instr_i;
		pc_o=pc_i;
end
endmodule
